message.content:
Apply NinjaPromo design system to these shared components. READ each file first, then EDIT them.

NinjaPromo design CSS classes (in index.html):
- `.ninja-card` — bg-#111111, border rgba(255,255,255,0.08), rounded-1rem
- `.gradient-text` — gradient text indigo→purple→pink  
- `.btn-gradient` — pill gradient button, rounded-full
- `.gradient-border` — gradient border card

Design patterns:
- Cards: `ninja-card` (replaces bg-[#0c0815], glass-panel)
- Buttons: rounded-full, primary=`btn-gradient`, secondary=`border border-white/[0.08] bg-white/[0.04] rounded-full`
- Typography: bold sans headings, `gradient-text` accents
- Borders: border-white/[0.06] or border-white/[0.08]
- Text: white headings, gray-500 body, purple-400 accents

Files to update (READ then EDIT each one):

1. `C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test\components\CategoryCard.tsx` — card styling: ninja-card, progress bars, item indicators
2. `C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test\components\ScoreRing.tsx` — update any surrounding card/bg styling
3. `C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test\components\CreditDisplay.tsx` — ninja-card if wrapped in a card
4. `C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test\components\SolutionModal.tsx` — modal bg: bg-[#111111], border-white/[0.08], buttons: btn-gradient or pill
5. `C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test\components\ProtectedRoute.tsx` — minimal, check if has UI to style
6. `C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test\components\LanguageSwitcher.tsx` — dropdown: bg-[#111111] border-white/[0.08], rounded-xl

Preserve ALL functionality. Only change styling classes, not logic or state.
